snippetLines.lineText: /// The advertised capabilities of the client.
/// Capabilities negotiated based on the request.
/// Timeouts that this device expects the client to observe.
/// A request to negotiate device capabilities.
//! This module provides a SPDM command for negotiating protocol capabilities.
/// A command for negotiating protocol capabilities.
//! This module provides traits for plugging in OS calls to specialized
//! hardware functions, such as power-on and reset-related capabilities.
//! `manticore` uses this functionality to respond to certain protocol
/// The timeout to report for a non-cryptographic operation
/// The timeout to report for a cryptographic operation.
/// Indicates that the device wishes to re-negotiate capabilities
/// (such as after reset or an update).
